backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the 15sec video platform, defining data structures and logic for video posts, replies, user profiles, follows, notifications, visitor stats, and admin/access control using mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two delete-mutation fix features (VideoPostCard and VideoReplyCard) to their relevant files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one- to two-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing component responsibilities and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes, wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider, and conditionally renders the login prompt or username setup modal based on auth state.
frontend/src/components/Branding.tsx: Simple branding component rendering the '15sec' app name with an animated pulsing red dot.
frontend/src/components/CookieConsent.ts: Fixed bottom-of-screen cookie consent card that persists acceptance to localStorage and hides itself once accepted.
frontend/src/components/FollowButton.tsx: Button component that toggles follow/unfollow for a target principal using React Query mutations, showing loading state and error toasts.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple sticky footer component displaying a copyright notice with border and muted styling.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with links to Home, Create, Notifications, Admin, and Account; displays the user's avatar from their profile and an unread notification badge.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Renders a centered login card for the 15sec app with a button that triggers Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/NotificationPane: Displays a dropdown panel of user notifications (likes, shares, replies), marks them as read on mount, and navigates to the relevant video or profile on click.
frontend/src/components/ReplyDialog.tsx: A modal dialog that wraps the VideoReplyCreator component, allowing users to record or upload a short video reply to a parent video.
frontend/src/components/ShareDialog.tsx: A modal dialog that lets users copy a share link or share a video post/reply internally on 15sec, triggering the appropriate share mutation.
frontend/src/components/UsernameSetupMod: A blocking modal that prompts new users to choose a unique username, with debounced availability checking before saving their profile.
frontend/src/components/VideoPostCard.ts: Renders a video post card with creator avatar, like/reply/share actions, and an admin/owner delete option, navigating to the post detail or profile on click.
frontend/src/components/VideoPostCreator: A form component that accepts a video file and title, uploads the video with progress tracking, and creates a new video post via the backend actor.
frontend/src/components/VideoRecorder.ts: A React component that uses the device camera to record video clips up to a configurable max duration, then passes the resulting WebM file to a callback. Supports camera switching, recording timer, and playback/retry of the recorded video.
frontend/src/components/VideoReplyCard.t: Displays a single video reply card with the creator's avatar, like/unlike, share, and nested reply actions, plus optional delete for owners and admins. Fetches reply metadata (likes, shares, reply count, user profile) via custom query hooks.
frontend/src/components/VideoReplyCreato: A multi-step form component that lets users either upload or record a short video reply to a parent post, then uploads it via the backend actor with progress tracking. Handles actor readiness checks and surfaces upload/error feedback via toasts.
frontend/src/components/VideoUploader.ts: Allows users to select a video file from their device and automatically trims it to a maximum duration using Canvas and MediaRecorder before passing the processed file to a callback. Handles metadata loading, frame-by-frame rendering, and audio capture during trimming.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, keyed by the current Internet Identity principal. Invalidates and refetches all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context (login, logout, identity, status) via a React context and AuthClient, with support for delegation validation and configurable auth options. Exports both the provider component and a useInternetIdentity hook for consuming the context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, admin operations, video posts/replies, follows, notifications, and visitor stats using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines light/dark theme CSS custom properties for the design system.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AccountPage.tsx: Account settings page allowing the authenticated user to edit their username/avatar, view their posts and replies, manage account deletion, and toggle theme or log out.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page displaying active account counts, visitor stats, and a user table with actions to promote, demote, or permanently delete accounts.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePage.tsx: Video creation page that lets users choose between uploading or recording a video (max 15 seconds) before proceeding to the post creation form.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home feed page that fetches and displays all video posts sorted by newest first, with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Public profile page that displays a user's avatar, follower/following counts, follow button, and tabs for their video posts and replies looked up by username.
frontend/src/pages/VideoDetailPage.tsx: Detail page for a single video post that fetches the post and its paginated replies by ID, displaying them with load-more functionality and navigation back to the feed.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom CSS-variable-based color tokens, border radius, Inter font family, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing a video sharing app with a known bug where delete confirmation dialogs close without actually deleting posts or replies, listing two fix features and one pending audit action.
